diffs.diff:
--- a/inspect_model.py
+++ b/inspect_model.py
@@ -0,0 +1,16 @@
+from speechbrain.inference.enhancement import SpectralMaskEnhancement

+import torch

+

+enhance_model = SpectralMaskEnhancement.from_hparams(

+    source='speechbrain/metricgan-plus-voicebank',

+    savedir='/opt/pretrained_models/metricgan-plus-voicebank',

+)

+print('modules:', dir(enhance_model.modules))

+print('modules keys:', list(enhance_model.modules.keys()) if hasattr(enhance_model.modules, 'keys') else 'no keys')

+print('hparams:', dir(enhance_model.hparams))

+print('type modules:', type(enhance_model.modules))

+# Try to find the model

+for attr in dir(enhance_model.modules):

+    if not attr.startswith('_'):

+        val = getattr(enhance_model.modules, attr)

+        print(f'  modules.{attr}: {type(val)}')
